description: A graphic with a photograph at the top showing an outdoor wedding-ceremony aisle lined with white chairs and flowers leading to two empty chairs, scattered with petals. A blue band below carries white text reading 'MARRIAGE FRAUD IS PUNISHABLE BY 5 years in prison and $250,000 in fines, it's not worth the risk!', with a U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal and label at the bottom.
notable_text: MARRIAGE FRAUD IS PUNISHABLE BY 5 years in prison and $250,000 in fines; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
